[[File:Level58-1.png|380px|link=]]

==Description== Founded by a wanderer by the name of [[Jerry M. Sercher]], the Backrooms Wanderers Organization, or B.W.O. for short, is a group whose goal is to rid the Backrooms of entities and discover new stuff. The group's goal is to discover new levels and substances within the Backrooms. B.W.O. is often friendly to wanderers and supports their requirements. They often recruit wanderers who are lost or in need of help in the Backrooms; these wanderers make up a significant portion of the group's members. Many of these wanderers become researchers or explorers after getting training from the group. B.W.O.'s main base is located on [[Level 58]], which might be considered the group's capital. The base at [[Level 2]] is another of the group's most significant outposts. There are plenty of B.W.O. outposts that were unsuccessful or destroyed.

==Hierarchy== [[Jerry M. Sercher]] was the leader of B.W.O. until his disappearance and departure from the group. After Jerry disappeared, presidential elections were held every five [[Level 58]] years. The roles in the group are as follows: • '''Leader:''' Leader of the B.W.O.
• '''Assistants:''' The one who helps the leader to make decisions, and is simply his assistant.
• '''Colony Leader:''' The leader of each outpost
• '''Researchers/Explorers:''' Members of the group who do the research or discoveries
• '''Other Members:''' Members appointed for a specific task

==History== The group started out as an exploratory group. Jerry M. Sercher, the group's first leader, formed the B.W.O. by assembling nine people to a level he discovered, [[Level 58]], in 1990. They later created B.W.O.'s first outpost on [[Level 58]].
In 1991, they discovered [[Level 305]], and [[Level 995]]. In 1992, after the base on [[Level 2]] had been built, it was discovered that there was a liquid pouring from the pipes, which was later identified as the [[Object 33|Memory Flame]].
[[Jerry M. Sercher]], the group's leader at the time, unintentionally traveled to [[The Hub]] while wondering around [[Level 1]], and lost the group in 1993. After the group's leader disappeared and left the group, a new leader, '''John Tunache''', took over and announced that there would now be a presidential election every five [[Level 58]] years. John Tunache's leadership lasted from 1993 until 1998. During this period, no new discoveries were made as John was more focused on politics.
After an election in 1998, '''Jorge Alpin''' was elected as the new leader of the group until 2003. Under Jorge's leadership, work began on a substance called '''Memorestoration''' that could reverse the effects of the [[Object 33|Memory Flame]]. However, before Jorge could complete this work, his leadership term expired, and '''Mert Amador''' was elected as the new leader. Mert was quite inexperienced in the Backrooms and had only traveled to [[Level 0]], [[Level 1]] and [[Level 2]]. He was then found and rescued by the B.W.O. base on [[Level 2]]. As Mert was quite inexperienced, he did nothing but keep the group afloat during his leadership. But if there was one thing he did, it was to give the group a new purpose. And that was to clear the Backrooms of entities.
Mert was known for hating entities, and so the first thing he did when he took over leadership was to kill a group of [[Entity 9|Facelings]] at [[Level 2]].
In 2006, he disappeared, and '''Henry Louis''' was chosen as the new leader. Henry Louis was the leader from 2006 to 2011. Henry learned that [[Jerry M. Sercher]], the group's missing and first leader, was living on [[Level 246]] and invited him back to the group, but [[Jerry M. Sercher]] denied it, saying he lived a peaceful life there.
Under his leadership, Henry discovered [[Level 408]] and created an outpost on [[Level 246]] and [[Level 22]].
'''Ruslan Alfaro''' was chosen as the new leader later in 2011. The exact details of the group's activities from 2011 to 2022 are unknown because '''Rosario Arrowsmith,''', the leader from 2021 to 2024, destroyed all of the group's information during this time.

==Accomplishments== ===Discovered Levels=== B.W.O. is an exploratory group that has explored and continues to explore many levels. [ [[Level 995]] ]
[ [[Level 118]] ]
[ [[Level 58]] ]
===Discovered/Invented Objects=== [ [[Object 33|Memory Flame]] ]
[ '''Memorestoration''' ] - Research in Progress
[ '''Radioactive Radios''' ]
===Other=== [ '''Extinction of the Inkpots''' ] - In 2014, all of the entities called "Inkpots", known for their ink-black coloring, were killed by B.W.O.

==Outposts== B.W.O. outposts are divided into three classes: '''Shelters''' (S), '''Research Facilities''' (R) and '''Warehouses''' (W). B.W.O.'s outposts are designated by Latin numbers. ---- Main Base: [ [[Level 58]] ] - '''[ Base Unus ]''' (R):
[[Jerry M. Sercher]] gathered a group of people and reached [[Level 58]], where he established the first outpost. Here, substances were experimented on and some very important decisions were made for the group.
---- [ [[Level 2]] ] - '''[ Base Duo ]''' (R):
A group of B.W.O. members who left the outpost on [[Level 58]] to investigate reached [[Level 2]] and established an outpost.
---- [ [[Level 427]] ] - '''[ Base Tres ]''' (S):
Some members of the B.W.O. realized it was a suitable location and established a colony on [[Level 427]].
---- [ [[Level 22]] ] - '''[ Base Quattuor ]''' (W):
B.W.O. stepped into [[Level 22]] due to the need to store the resources they had somewhere and built a warehouse.
---- [ [[Level 305]] ] - '''[ Base Quinque ]''' (R):
To investigate '''The Negative Glitch''', B.W.O. established a research facility.
---- [ [[Level 246]] ] - '''[ Base Sex ]''' (S):
B.W.O. received news from [[Jerry M. Sercher]] after a long time, visited him, and set up a shelter in the level.
----

The Speech

[[File:HenrySpeech2.png|400px|link=|center]] "I'd like to announce that we, the great [[B.W.O.|Backrooms Wanderers Organization]], have discovered the cure for the one and only [[Object 33|Memory Flame]]!" Said Henry Louis. "Yes, we found it, we found the cure. We found the cure that has been searched for years. And what is it?" How did they found a cure? What's the recipe? "Here it is, the great [[Memorestoration]]! From now on, we'll put an end to death and memory loss once and for all. " Seriously, how did a grumpy old man like Henry find that crucial cure that had been sought for years? ...Is it even real? {{Collapse|initial=
[[File:Memorestoration.jpg|200px|link=|center]]
|final=|num=radio2|body=
[[File:BWORadio.png|400px|link=|center]] So i followed them. [[File:BWOhq.png|400px|link=|center]]
I followed them to the base under [[Level 58]]... "Hey. Henry." "You... You sure this is right? Morally?" "You know... What we're doing..." "I don't know man... Feels wrong..." "Like, not everything is money dude." "[cough] Okay... sir.... got it." "Wait." "There's... Someone there..." Then you know the rest. I saw big bottles of [[Memorestoration]]. Henry took one and forced me to drink some. I'm not feeling well. I don't think this is a cure... This... I think this is the disease itself...

{{Collapse|initial=
''I felt dizzy before i woke up in [[Level 305]].''
|final=|num=radio3|body=[[File:HenryLook.png|400px|link=|center]]
"Who was the agent?" "We're sure the [[L.E.C.]] sent him sir. The evil is against us." "Is he dead?" "Yes sir... He is... No one can stand the [[Memorestoration]], at least none of the patients did." "Good." "Sir..." "No." "But..." "The truth is yet to be known." "[[Jerry M. Sercher|Jerry]] would hate us if he knew sir..." "So? I said ''The truth is yet to be known.''" ''But I am alive. Agent 118 is alive.''}}}}}}}}}} }} }}
